purpose: Machine-readable task state snapshot for LiveMask multi-repo dispatch, reconciliation, and next-task planning.

modules.summary: Docs-owned completion report intake, task ledger, issue sync, module status summary, and next Cursor task dispatch.

tasks.notes: Defines the docs dispatcher loop for completion report intake, issue sync, module summary, and next task creation.
Adds the first-read project status onboarding file so any AI tool can start from repo-native state instead of memory.
Introduces this machine-readable ledger and validation script.
Documents Codex as the docs-side task dispatch center and defines synchronous/asynchronous workflows.
Adds a standard Cursor task brief template for scoped dispatch.
Adds a lightweight local reconciler for ledger shape, task docs, and evidence sanity.

tasks.validation: bash -n scripts/issue-sync-strict.sh, bash -n scripts/*.sh, git diff --check, dev-merge-guard
tasks.notes: Cross-repo Issue presence and ambiguity check implemented in livemask-ci-cd; no existing docs/ci-cd Issue was found during docs sync.

tasks.validation: bash -n scripts/*.sh, git diff --check, workflow YAML parse, issue-sync warn/strict mode checks, dev-merge-guard
tasks.notes: Fixes the first strict Issue sync integration defects: staging self-check now warns instead of blocking on historical missing Issues, scan-all uses task_id+repo pairs, YAML/help/JSON/exit-code bugs are fixed.

tasks.validation: python3 scripts/audit-task-center.py, python3 scripts/audit-task-center.py --format json, bash scripts/check-docs.sh, git diff --check
tasks.notes: Adds a read-only offline audit center with gate/warning/suggestion layers, concise text output, JSON report, and docs check wiring.

tasks.validation: bash -n scripts/*.sh, git diff --check, dry-run decision table in staging-smoke
tasks.notes: Guarded Issue close/reopen automation is merged to livemask-ci-cd dev. No existing docs/ci-cd Issue was found during docs sync, so no Issue was closed from this window.

tasks.validation: python3 scripts/check-task-leases.py, python3 scripts/check-task-leases.py --self-test, bash scripts/check-docs.sh, git diff --check
tasks.notes: Adds file-backed active lease registry, deterministic collision check, docs check wiring, and lease start/end workflow.

tasks.validation: python3 scripts/audit-task-center.py --remote-ref-self-test, python3 scripts/audit-task-center.py --remote-refs --no-log, python3 scripts/audit-task-center.py --remote-actions --no-log --format json, python3 scripts/audit-task-center.py --remote-issues --no-log --format json, bash scripts/check-docs.sh, git diff --check
tasks.notes: Adds opt-in read-only GitHub Issue, Actions, and sibling origin/dev audit modes to audit-task-center.py while keeping base docs checks offline.

tasks.validation: Child repo dev-merge-guard PASS for livemask-backend, livemask-nodeagent, livemask-app, livemask-admin, livemask-website, livemask-job-service, livemask-ci-cd; bash scripts/check-docs.sh; python3 scripts/audit-task-center.py --no-log; git diff --check

modules.summary: Protocol template, LKG, rollback, reconnect, and smoke closure across Backend, NodeAgent, Job Service, Admin, App, and CI/CD.

Unlocked by App real-backend reconnect cutover at livemask-app dev e797875. Add runtime smoke for App-facing Backend reconnect hints and connect config session_id behavior.

Final cross-repo runtime smoke must distinguish PASS from accepted SKIP.

modules.summary: Backend Swagger/OpenAPI documentation, API contract discoverability, and future client integration support.

tasks.notes: New requirement: all Backend APIs must align with Swagger/OpenAPI. Backend may expose machine-readable OpenAPI JSON for Admin/CI, but human Swagger UI must only be visible inside logged-in livemask-admin. Every later Backend API add/change/delete must update OpenAPI and pass route/API drift checks. Cursor handoff: docs/development/cursor-handoffs/BACKEND-SWAGGER-API-DOCS-CURSOR_HANDOFF.md.
Admin must provide the logged-in Swagger UI surface after Backend exposes validated OpenAPI JSON. Swagger UI must not be public from Backend.

open_gaps: Backend OpenAPI 3 document and Admin-authenticated Swagger UI are not yet implemented.
Backend API route/OpenAPI drift gate is not yet implemented.
CI/CD OpenAPI drift validation can be added after backend docs exist.
